DIRECT FREIGHT WORKSPACE

Shipper Portal

Post freight and connect with verified carriers without rebuilding the platform later.

WORKSPACE STATUSGroundworkRC1 foundation
ACCOUNT TYPEBusinessRole-based access planned
DATA STATUSDemoSupabase schema included
LAUNCH TRACKPhase 2After driver public beta

📦 Post Freight

Origin, destination, dimensions, appointment and rate.

🚛 Carrier Invitations

Invite carriers by equipment, safety and region.

📄 Trip Documents

Rate confirmations, BOL, POD and delivery notes.
